GMPEhaz 0.1.13.52
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Introduction to GMPEhaz

GMPEhaz

A R package for wrapping GMPE functions from Norman Abrahamson’s fortran HAZ code.

Install

install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("personlin/GMPEhaz")

Links

  • Browse source code at
    http://​github.com/​personlin/​GMPEhaz
  • Report a bug at
    http://​github.com/​personlin/​GMPEhaz/​issues
